access_boundary: Private packet access requires a non-empty authorization reference and a validating access-log record. This approval does not itself create any access event and does not inspect packet text.
access_log_rule: Every private-packet access event must validate against schemas/private_packet_access_log.schema.json and scripts/validate_human_llm_rights_gate.py. Access logs must contain no raw source text, excerpts, prompt inputs, model inputs, or source-derived packet contents.
explicit_boundary: This approval does not authorize provider transmission, human coding, model execution, final execution, public redistribution, or model-visible prompt generation.
export_rule: Export remains blocked unless separately authorized and logged with non-blocked rights, passed private-packet handling, destination, export rationale, and any required downstream gates.
hash_verification_rule: Packet hashes may be verified without exposing text. Hash-only verification must use transformation_type=hash_verification_only or none as appropriate, content_viewed=false unless viewing occurred, content_exported=false, content_transmitted_to_provider=false, and a valid record_hash.
human_coding_rule: Human coding remains blocked until final authorization, documented coding environment, packet hash verification, and record-locking readiness are complete.
model_execution_rule: Model execution remains blocked until provider/model/account, runtime settings, pricing, request preservation, provider transmission, and final authorization gates pass.
provider_transmission_rule: Provider transmission remains blocked until provider/model/account and runtime gates pass, provider data handling is reviewed, provider transmission is separately authorized, and final execution authorization is granted.
public_artifact_rule: Public artifacts may contain approved metadata and non-content hashes only. They must not contain private packet contents, copyrighted excerpts, generated prompts containing source material, or source-derived fixtures.
scope: Controlled private-packet handling protocol approval for metadata-only gate preparation in PR #20. This approval covers storage, hash verification, and access-log requirements only.
storage_boundary: Private packets remain in controlled local or institutional storage. Private packet text must not be committed to public artifacts, tests, logs, pull requests, or prompts.
transformation_after_hash_rule: Any transformation, normalization, redaction, packet construction, or provider-request construction requires a transformation type, rationale, passed private-packet gate status, and valid packet_hash_after. Hash-only verification may record an after-hash only when explicitly classified and explained.
